result:
I’d make people unable to dehumanize each other.

Not “nicer,” not “agree more,” not “never fight” — just unable to reduce another person to something less than fully human.

You’d still have conflict, competition, borders, grief, ego, ideology. But genocide gets harder. Cruelty gets harder. Exploitation gets harder. Indifference gets harder. A lot of the worst things in history depend on that one mental permission slip.

If that disappeared, I think the world would still be messy — but far less monstrous.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
